use_codes.desc: THE SHORT TERM TREATMENT (UP TO 10 DAYS) IN PTS HAVING GASTROESOPHAGEAL REFLUX DISEASE (GERD) AS AN ALTERNATIVE TO ORAL THERAPY IN PTS WHEN THERAPY WITH NEXIUM CAPSULES IS NOT POSSIBLE OR APPROPRIATE
RISK REDUCTION OF REBLEEDING IN PTS FOLLOWING THERAPEUTIC ENDOSCOPY FOR ACUTE BLEEDING GASTRIC OR DUODENAL ULCERS IN ADULTS.
